title: cordia vignei
intro: Cordia vignei, also known as the Indian cherry, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cordia vignei include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Cordia vignei include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
